sentences.target: Dépêche-toi, sinon on rate le bus.

translations.fr: Dépêche-toi, sinon on rate le bus.
translations.en: Hurry up, otherwise we’ll miss the bus.
translations.es: Date prisa, si no vamos a perder el autobús.
translations.de: Beeil dich, sonst verpassen wir den Bus.
translations.ko: 서둘러, 안 그러면 버스를 놓칠 거야.
translations.zh-Hans: 快点，否则我们会赶不上公交车。
translations.yue: 快啲，唔係就趕唔上巴士。
translations.ru: Поторопись, иначе мы опоздаем на автобус.
translations.pt: Anda logo, senão vamos perder o ônibus.
translations.vi: Nhanh lên, nếu không chúng ta sẽ lỡ xe buýt.
translations.nl: Schiet op, anders missen we de bus.
translations.hi: जल्दी करो, नहीं तो बस छूट जाएगी.
translations.pl: Pospiesz się, inaczej spóźnimy się na autobus.
translations.el: Βιάσου, αλλιώς θα χάσουμε το λεωφορείο.
translations.nb: Skynd deg, ellers mister vi bussen.
translations.id: Cepat, kalau tidak kita akan ketinggalan bus.
translations.sv: Skynda dig, annars missar vi bussen.
translations.cs: Pospěš si, jinak nám ujede autobus.
translations.da: Skynd dig, ellers når vi ikke bussen.
translations.ja: 急いで、そうしないとバスに乗り遅れる。

tokens.explanation: Imperative 2SG of pronominal verb se dépêcher with the attached reflexive pronoun toi (affirmative imperative uses -toi); directive addressed to the listener.
Adverb linking the two clauses; signals the consequence that will occur if the command is not followed.
Subject pronoun (3SG form used colloquially for ‘we’) functioning as the subject of the verb.
Present indicative, 3SG agreeing with on; transitive verb taking a direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular, marking the noun bus as a specific referent; introduces the direct object.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of rate.

sentences.target: Prends une veste, sinon tu vas avoir froid.
sentences.reading: /pʁɑ̃ yn vɛst si.nɔ̃ ty va a.vwaʁ fʁwa/

translations.fr: Prends une veste, sinon tu vas avoir froid.
translations.ipa: /pʁɑ̃ yn vɛst si.nɔ̃ ty va a.vwaʁ fʁwa/
translations.en: Take a jacket, otherwise you’ll be cold.
translations.es: Ponte una chaqueta, si no tendrás frío.
translations.de: Zieh eine Jacke an, sonst wirst du frieren.
translations.it: Prendi una giacca, altrimenti avrai freddo.
translations.ko: 자켓 챙겨, 안 그러면 추울 거야.
translations.zh-Hans: 穿一件外套，否则你会冷。
translations.pt: Leva um casaco, senão vai sentir frio.
translations.he: קח מעיל, אחרת יהיה לך קר.
translations.vi: Mặc áo khoác vào, nếu không bạn sẽ bị lạnh.
translations.nl: Trek een jas aan, anders krijg je het koud.
translations.hu: Vegyél fel egy kabátot, különben fázni fogsz.
translations.hi: जैकेट पहन लो, नहीं तो ठंड लग जाएगी.
translations.el: Πάρε ένα μπουφάν, αλλιώς θα κρυώσεις.
translations.nb: Ta på deg en jakke, ellers blir du kald.
translations.id: Pakailah jaket, kalau tidak kamu akan kedinginan.
translations.sv: Ta på dig en jacka, annars blir du kall.
translations.ro: Ia o geacă, altfel o să-ți fie frig.
translations.cs: Vezmi si bundu, jinak ti bude zima.
translations.da: Tag en jakke på, ellers bliver du kold.
translations.fi: Laita takki päälle, muuten tulee kylmä.
translations.ja: 上着を着て、そうしないと寒くなるよ。

tokens.explanation: Imperative, 2SG; directive to perform the action.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces the noun veste as a non-specific item.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of Prends.
Adverb linking to a consequence clause.
Subject pronoun, 2SG; subject of vas and of the periphrastic construction.
Present indicative, 2SG of aller used as a periphrastic future auxiliary (futur proche) with an infinitive.
Infinitive lexical verb complement of vas; in the idiom avoir froid expresses experiencing the sensation.
Adjective used predicatively in the fixed expression avoir froid, describing the subject’s state.

sentences.target: Ferme la porte, sinon le chat sort.
sentences.reading: /fɛʁm la pɔʁt si.nɔ̃ lə ʃa sɔʁ/

translations.fr: Ferme la porte, sinon le chat sort.
translations.ipa: /fɛʁm la pɔʁt si.nɔ̃ lə ʃa sɔʁ/
translations.en: Close the door, otherwise the cat will get out.
translations.es: Cierra la puerta, si no el gato se escapará.
translations.de: Mach die Tür zu, sonst läuft die Katze raus.
translations.it: Chiudi la porta, altrimenti il gatto uscirà.
translations.ko: 문 닫아, 안 그러면 고양이가 밖으로 나가.
translations.zh-Hans: 把门关上，否则猫会跑出去。
translations.yue: 閂埋門，唔係隻貓會走出去。
translations.pt: Feche a porta, senão o gato vai sair.
translations.he: סגור את הדלת, אחרת החתול יצא.
translations.tr: Kapıyı kapat, yoksa kedi dışarı çıkar.
translations.vi: Đóng cửa lại, nếu không con mèo sẽ chạy ra ngoài.
translations.nl: Doe de deur dicht, anders loopt de kat naar buiten.
translations.hu: Csukd be az ajtót, különben a macska kimegy.
translations.hi: दरवाज़ा बंद करो, नहीं तो बिल्ली बाहर निकल जाएगी.
translations.pl: Zamknij drzwi, bo inaczej kot wyjdzie.
translations.el: Κλείσε την πόρτα, αλλιώς η γάτα θα βγει έξω.
translations.nb: Lukk døra, ellers går katten ut.
translations.id: Tutup pintu, kalau tidak kucing akan keluar.
translations.sv: Stäng dörren, annars går katten ut.
translations.ro: Închide ușa, altfel pisica va ieși afară.
translations.cs: Zavři dveře, jinak kočka vyjde ven.
translations.da: Luk døren, ellers går katten ud.
translations.fi: Sulje ovi, muuten kissa menee ulos.
translations.ja: ドアを閉めて、そうしないと猫が外に出る。

tokens.explanation: Imperative, 2SG; directive to perform the action.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces the noun porte.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of Ferme.
Adverb linking to a consequence clause.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the subject noun chat.
Common noun, masculine; subject of sort.
Present indicative, 3SG; intransitive verb indicating movement out.

sentences.target: Viens à six heures, sinon je pars.
sentences.reading: /vjɛ̃ a sis œʁ si.nɔ̃ ʒə paʁ/

translations.fr: Viens à six heures, sinon je pars.
translations.ipa: /vjɛ̃ a sis œʁ si.nɔ̃ ʒə paʁ/
translations.en: Come at six o’clock, otherwise I’m leaving.
translations.es: Ven a las seis, si no me voy.
translations.de: Komm um sechs, sonst gehe ich.
translations.it: Vieni alle sei, altrimenti me ne vado.
translations.ko: 여섯 시에 와, 안 그러면 난 갈 거야.
translations.ru: Приходи в шесть, иначе я уйду.
translations.pt: Vem às seis, senão eu vou embora.
translations.vi: Đến lúc sáu giờ, nếu không tôi sẽ đi.
translations.nl: Kom om zes uur, anders ga ik weg.
translations.uk: Прийди о шостій, інакше я піду.
translations.hi: छह बजे आना, नहीं तो मैं चला जाऊँगा.
translations.nb: Kom klokka seks, ellers drar jeg.
translations.id: Datang jam enam, kalau tidak aku pergi.
translations.sv: Kom klockan sex, annars går jag.
translations.ro: Vino la ora șase, altfel plec.
translations.da: Kom klokken seks, ellers går jeg.
translations.ja: 6時に来て、そうしないと帰る。

tokens.explanation: Imperative, 2SG; directive to perform the action.
Preposition introducing a time complement.
Cardinal numeral; modifies heures to specify the time.
Common noun, feminine plural; object of the preposition à in a time expression.
Adverb introducing the alternative consequence.
Subject pronoun, 1SG; subject of pars.
Present indicative, 1SG; intransitive verb expressing departure.

Viens à six heures, sinon je pars.

en: Hurry up, otherwise we’ll miss the bus.
Take a jacket, otherwise you’ll be cold.
Close the door, otherwise the cat will get out.
Come at six o’clock, otherwise I’m leaving.

es: Date prisa, si no vamos a perder el autobús.
Ponte una chaqueta, si no tendrás frío.
Cierra la puerta, si no el gato se escapará.
Ven a las seis, si no me voy.
de: Beeil dich, sonst verpassen wir den Bus.
Zieh eine Jacke an, sonst wirst du frieren.
Mach die Tür zu, sonst läuft die Katze raus.
Komm um sechs, sonst gehe ich.
it: Prendi una giacca, altrimenti avrai freddo.
Chiudi la porta, altrimenti il gatto uscirà.
Vieni alle sei, altrimenti me ne vado.
ko: 서둘러, 안 그러면 버스를 놓칠 거야.
자켓 챙겨, 안 그러면 추울 거야.
문 닫아, 안 그러면 고양이가 밖으로 나가.
여섯 시에 와, 안 그러면 난 갈 거야.
zh-Hans: 快点，否则我们会赶不上公交车。
穿一件外套，否则你会冷。
把门关上，否则猫会跑出去。
yue: 快啲，唔係就趕唔上巴士。
閂埋門，唔係隻貓會走出去。
ru: Поторопись, иначе мы опоздаем на автобус.
Приходи в шесть, иначе я уйду.
pt: Anda logo, senão vamos perder o ônibus.
Leva um casaco, senão vai sentir frio.
Feche a porta, senão o gato vai sair.
Vem às seis, senão eu vou embora.
he: קח מעיל, אחרת יהיה לך קר.
סגור את הדלת, אחרת החתול יצא.
tr: Kapıyı kapat, yoksa kedi dışarı çıkar.
vi: Nhanh lên, nếu không chúng ta sẽ lỡ xe buýt.
Mặc áo khoác vào, nếu không bạn sẽ bị lạnh.
Đóng cửa lại, nếu không con mèo sẽ chạy ra ngoài.
Đến lúc sáu giờ, nếu không tôi sẽ đi.
nl: Schiet op, anders missen we de bus.
Trek een jas aan, anders krijg je het koud.
Doe de deur dicht, anders loopt de kat naar buiten.
Kom om zes uur, anders ga ik weg.
uk: Прийди о шостій, інакше я піду.
hu: Vegyél fel egy kabátot, különben fázni fogsz.
Csukd be az ajtót, különben a macska kimegy.
hi: जल्दी करो, नहीं तो बस छूट जाएगी.
जैकेट पहन लो, नहीं तो ठंड लग जाएगी.
दरवाज़ा बंद करो, नहीं तो बिल्ली बाहर निकल जाएगी.
छह बजे आना, नहीं तो मैं चला जाऊँगा.
pl: Pospiesz się, inaczej spóźnimy się na autobus.
Zamknij drzwi, bo inaczej kot wyjdzie.
el: Βιάσου, αλλιώς θα χάσουμε το λεωφορείο.
Πάρε ένα μπουφάν, αλλιώς θα κρυώσεις.
Κλείσε την πόρτα, αλλιώς η γάτα θα βγει έξω.
nb: Skynd deg, ellers mister vi bussen.
Ta på deg en jakke, ellers blir du kald.
Lukk døra, ellers går katten ut.
Kom klokka seks, ellers drar jeg.
id: Cepat, kalau tidak kita akan ketinggalan bus.
Pakailah jaket, kalau tidak kamu akan kedinginan.
Tutup pintu, kalau tidak kucing akan keluar.
Datang jam enam, kalau tidak aku pergi.
sv: Skynda dig, annars missar vi bussen.
Ta på dig en jacka, annars blir du kall.
Stäng dörren, annars går katten ut.
Kom klockan sex, annars går jag.
ro: Ia o geacă, altfel o să-ți fie frig.
Închide ușa, altfel pisica va ieși afară.
Vino la ora șase, altfel plec.
cs: Pospěš si, jinak nám ujede autobus.
Vezmi si bundu, jinak ti bude zima.
Zavři dveře, jinak kočka vyjde ven.
da: Skynd dig, ellers når vi ikke bussen.
Tag en jakke på, ellers bliver du kold.
Luk døren, ellers går katten ud.
Kom klokken seks, ellers går jeg.
fi: Laita takki päälle, muuten tulee kylmä.
Sulje ovi, muuten kissa menee ulos.
ja: 急いで、そうしないとバスに乗り遅れる。
上着を着て、そうしないと寒くなるよ。
ドアを閉めて、そうしないと猫が外に出る。
6時に来て、そうしないと帰る。
